summary: Comprehensive testing of video hosting service completed successfully. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with proper authentication flow, folder management, video upload/management, and settings page.

minor_issues.issue: FFmpeg processing fails for non-video files (expected behavior)
minor_issues.impact: Videos uploaded with invalid format show 'failed' status
minor_issues.note: This is expected behavior for invalid video files

minor_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components
minor_issues.note: Accessibility warning - should add proper descriptions to dialogs

passed_tests: Forced password change flow on first login
CRUD operations for folders, videos, and embed settings
Video processing workflow (metadata extraction, thumbnail generation, HLS transcoding)
